events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: field-service visit, boiler & pump piping, observed field condition: air separator in wrong location. Work rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Air separator wrong location is non-compliant with manufacturer/hydronics design; likely fail. Need component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Risk? Air separator wrong location can cause air accumulation, pump cavitation, reduced heat transfer, corrosion, system inefficiency, potential equipment damage. Risk maybe medium or high. Since boiler & pump piping, air separator wrong location can cause operational issues but not immediate critical safety? Could be high if boiler overheats due to airlock. But typical risk medium. Need decide fail because non-compliant. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 80? Value not asked, 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0/list. Need findings: air separator installed at incorrect location, not at highest temperature/point or per design; will fail to remove air effectively. Actions: relocate air separator to correct location per manufacturer/drawing, typically on supply side after boiler, at high point/temperature, ensure proper orientation and isolation. Rationale: Air separators must be located where air can be released (high temperature, low velocity, high point); wrong location violates hydronic design and manufacturer requirements, causing air binding, cavitation, corrosion. References: mfr manuals, hydronics references (e.g., ASHRAE, Hydronics Institute). Need JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.

events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"medium","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":80,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Air separator is installed in the wrong location and cannot effectively remove entrained air from the hydronic loop.","Incorrect location violates the manufacturer’s installation requirements and accepted hydronic design practice."],"actions":["Relocate the air separator to the correct location per the OEM installation manual and project drawings, typically on the supply side after the boiler at the point of highest temperature/lowest solubility and with proper orientation/valving.","Purge and vent the system after relocation and verify air elimination at startup."],"rationale":"An air separator must be placed where dissolved air comes out of solution (high temperature, appropriate velocity, and high points) so it can be vented. Installing it in the wrong location leaves air in the system, leading to air binding, pump cavitation, reduced heat transfer, noise, and accelerated corrosion. This is a non-compliant installation and must be corrected before close-out.","references":["Manufacturer boiler/pump piping installation manual","Hydronics design references / ASHRAE HVAC applications"]}
